## Visual Evidence
### SSE stream parser handles multi-line data values correctly

![Infrastructure panel using SSE events with fixed multi-line parser](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/5a97847a79d4c57deb7b2f3f7cb407f27e68a358/openspec/changes/gh-197-sse-multi-line-parser/evidence/01-sse-log-output.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open the app and verify no SSE parsing errors
2. Verify the infrastructure panel renders (uses SSE events)
3. Verify no console errors related to SSE parsing
